final_source:
build for javascript backend with html frontend

database is local memory

create a Notes table:
  title, required
  body, required

when user calls GET /api/notes:
  list = get all Notes
  send back list

when user calls POST /api/notes sending data:
  requires login
  save data to Notes
  send back data

page 'Home' at '/':
  notes = get all Notes
  section 'Notes':
    display notes as table
